hackathons.description: Competed in the Telkom 10X Hackathon 2025, one of South Africa's most prestigious tech competitions. Presented SafeRide — a ride-hailing kiosk and web app that helps people request rides safely without a smartphone, mobile data, or cash. Awarded 2nd place for innovation, technical execution, and social impact.

Entered the MICT SETA Western Cape Regional competition with QueUp — a smart queue management platform eliminating physical waiting lines at government institutions across Cape Town. Awarded 2nd place in the Western Cape region for addressing a critical service delivery problem faced by millions of South Africans.
